detail: Needs Attention shows 81 of 164 items (was 86 before fix). Read from UI span: "81 of 164 items"

Closed banner correct: "Next delivery: Friday, 2026-03-27Place Order ". Total SKUs = 14 (different from Araneta's 164). Store assignment changed.
